zh.Edgartown, Dukes, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼度可斯艾加托
zh.lifeSummary: John Smith於1611年出生在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特奧爾德姆。他於1639年6月10日與Deborah Parkhurst在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1644年住在澳洲諾特黑 特利托利且於1654年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾加托。他去世於1673年6月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼度可斯韋斯特 迪斯波利享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Smith于1611年出生在英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特奧爾德姆。他于1639年6月10日与Deborah Parkhurst在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1644年住在澳大利亚諾特黑 特利托利且于1654年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾加托。他去世于1673年6月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼度可斯韋斯特 迪斯波利享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Smith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

variants.name: Smither
meanings: English (Surrey): occupational name from Middle English smith(i)ere, smeth(i)ere ‘blacksmith’, a derivative of Middle English smithen, smethen, ‘to make (something) in metal, to forge’. Compare Smith .

variants.name: Smithey
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from Middle English smithi ‘smithy, forge’ (Old Norse smithja), used either as a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, or an occupational name for someone who worked in one. Compare Smith and Smead .

variants.name: Smyth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ronan, Aidan, Brigid, Conor, Eoin, Malachy, Paddy.
English: variant of   Smith  . This form of the surname is particularly common Ireland.

variants.name: McGowan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Siobhan, Cormac, Seamus, Aileen, Colm, Eithne, Kieran, Niall, Paddy.

Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (a') Ghobhainn or Mac Gobhann (Scottish) or Mac (an) Ghabhann (Irish), ‘son of (the) smith’. This name has also been Anglicized as Smith and Smithson .

variants.name: Smead
meanings: occupational name from Middle English smeth(e) ‘smith’, a phonetic variant of Smith 1 that was widespread in medieval England, especially in south-eastern and south-western counties.

topographic, occupational, and habitational name from Middle English smethe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smethe), a side form of Smith 2, for someone who lived and worked at a blacksmith's, or who lived in or came from a place so named, such as Smeeth (Kent) or Smeed Farm in Hastingleigh (Kent). Compare the synonymous Smithey .

variants.name: Faber
meanings: German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), and Danish; Slovak and Czech (mainly Fáber): occupational name from Latin faber ‘blacksmith’. At the time of the Reformation, it was much used as a humanistic name, a translation into Latin of vernacular surnames such as German Schmidt and Dutch Smit . Compare Fabri and Fauber .

History: In North America, this surname was originally also part of a title. It was François Lefebvre, sieur Duplessis Faber from Paris, France, whose title sieur Duplessis Faber was shortened into the surname Faber. He married Marie-Madeleine Chorel in Champlain, QC, in 1689.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: John Smith was born in 1611, in Oldham, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom. He married Deborah Parkhurst on 10 June 1639, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Northern Territory, Australia in 1644 and Edgartown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1654. He died on 10 June 1673, in West Tisbury, Dukes, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: John Smith est né en 1611, à Oldham, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Deborah Parkhurst le 10 juin 1639, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Northern Territory, Australie en 1644 et à Edgartown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1654. Il est décédé le 10 juin 1673, à West Tisbury, Dukes, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 62 ans.

Juni 1673 im Alter von 62 Jahren in West Tisbury, Dukes, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: John Smith è nato il nel 1611 nel Oldham, Greater Manchester, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Deborah Parkhurst il 10 giugno 1639, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Northern Territory, Australia nel 1644 e nel Edgartown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1654. Morì il 10 giugno 1673, nel West Tisbury, Dukes, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.Edgartown, Dukes, Massachusetts Bay, Bri: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーダケスエドガートウン
ja.lifeSummary: John Smithは1611年にイギリスイギリスグレアター マンチェスターオルドハムで生まれた。1639年6月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンでDeborah Parkhurstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1644年にはオーストラリアノースエルン テリトリーに，1654年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエドガートウンに住んでいた。彼は1673年6月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーダケスウエスト ティスブリーで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Smith(은)는 1611년 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 드함에서 태어났다. 그는 1639년 6월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 Deborah Parkhurst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1644년도에 오스트레일리아 노르더 테리토리에서, 1654년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에드가타운에서 살았다. 그는 1673년 6월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 드크스 웨스트 티스버이에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Smith nasceu em 1611, em Oldham, Greater Manchester, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Deborah Parkhurst em 10 de junho de 1639, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Northern Territory, Austrália em 1644 e em Edgartown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1654. Ele faleceu em 10 de junho de 1673, em West Tisbury, Dukes, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Smith родился в 1611 г. в местности олдхам, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Deborah Parkhurst 10 июня 1639 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности нортирн тирритори, Австралия в 1644 году и в местности эджартоун, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1654 году. Он умер 10 июня 1673 г. в местности вест тисбури, дукесь, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: John Smith nació en 1611, en Oldham, Greater Manchester, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Deborah Parkhurst el 10 de junio de 1639, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Northern Territory, Australia en 1644 y en Edgartown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1654. Murió el 10 de junio de 1673, en West Tisbury, Dukes, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 62 años.
